title: Overly Permissive HTTP Methods
description: An unauthenticated surface advertised risky HTTP methods during active validation.
impact: Unnecessary methods can expand the attack surface for content modification, tunneling, or trace abuse.
likelihood: Medium when OPTIONS responses expose methods beyond expected read-only operations.
recommendations: Limit allowed methods to those strictly required by the application.
Disable TRACE and review PUT, DELETE, and PATCH exposure on public routes.
Validate authorization checks for any state-changing method that remains enabled.
